response.justification: Despite a strong general software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ development experience on Windows platforms and has no clear exposure to capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to a brief academic thesis and NI LabWindows™/CVI work, which is not equivalent to enterprise financial systems development.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in DevOps, CI/CD, and testing practices
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No evidence of 5–10 years of professional C++ on Windows as required
No demonstrated experience in fixed income, capital markets, or banking domains
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
